text:
Created attachment 253779
www/py-mov-cli-soundcloud

mov-cli-soundcloud is a plugin for mov-cli version 4 that allows users to stream
music from SoundCloud directly through the command line. It enables users
to search for tracks, playlists, and user profiles on SoundCloud. Once
configured, users can play their desired audio content using specific
commands in the terminal, enhancing the mov-cli experience with access
to SoundCloud's extensive music library.

https://github.com/mov-cli/mov-cli-soundcloud
